cards.name: Monumental Emerald Lattice
cards.title: Monumental Emerald Lattice
cards.altText:
A dim interior holds geometry in gentle suspension, forms glowing through soft luminescence.
Emerald tones deepen and lighten across the geometry, shifting into neighboring hues.
Broad planes layer at commanding scale, filling the space with substantial readable forms.
Elements drift in loose orbital paths, gentle spiraling without strict adherence.
Mixed surfaces with moderate fragmentation, some panels smooth, others faceted, anchored by 146 luminous points.
cards.reading: A pale green heart beating inside folded glass, something held close that refuses to go dark.

cards.name: Layered Field Geometry
cards.title: Layered Field Geometry
cards.altText:
Geometry drifts behind veils of diffusing light, the space itself glowing with atmospheric warmth.
Intense amethyst saturates every surface — a bold, singular chromatic identity.
A measured arrangement of translucent planes fills the space, balancing density with legibility.
Forms follow a coherent flowing pattern, creating visible directional structure.
Silk-smooth flowing panels with clean whole edges, liquid geometry without fracture, anchored by 141 luminous points.
cards.reading: Violet smoke rising from a cathedral floor, the stars inside it small and unafraid.

cards.name: Golden Minimal Field
cards.title: Golden Minimal Field
cards.altText:
Luminous geometry fills the field with steady radiance, forms visible through spreading halos.
Multiple hues disperse through the forms, amber anchoring a broad shifting spectrum.
A cloud of particles populates the field, forms blending into atmospheric texture.
Ordered elements emanate radially, a starburst of crystal planes diverging from the center. A single unified core anchors the composition.
Shattered geometry disperses in every direction, smooth and angular fragments intermixed, anchored by 231 luminous points.
cards.reading: A handful of autumn thrown upward, catching light before it falls — gold and rose tangled in wire.

cards.name: Curling Teal Layered
cards.title: Curling Teal Layered
cards.altText:
Half-seen forms breathe through darkness, their light dissolving into atmospheric haze.
Pure achromatic structure in silver and white, geometry without chromatic identity.
Sparse fragments are carefully placed at readable scale, each form individually distinct.
Orbital bands wrap around the form, arcs of geometry spiraling with architectural discipline.
Compact geometry with mixed crystal character, smooth panels alongside angular faces, anchored by 137 luminous points.
cards.reading: Silver breath on a winter window, scattered embers remembering warmth they once carried.

cards.name: Drifting Ruby Dimensional
cards.title: Drifting Ruby Dimensional
cards.altText:
Luminous geometry fills the field with steady radiance, forms visible through spreading halos.
Rich ruby dominates with vivid accents from adjacent hues adding chromatic depth.
A measured arrangement of translucent planes fills the space, balancing density with legibility.
Geometry organizes loosely around organic flow, structure present but unhurried. A single unified core anchors the composition.
Angular crystal faces catch and scatter light, sharp edges moderately dispersed, anchored by 170 luminous points.
cards.reading: Stained glass seen through closed eyes — plum and amber colliding where dreaming begins.

cards.name: Streaming Essential Plane
cards.title: Streaming Essential Plane
cards.altText:
Geometry drifts behind veils of diffusing light, the space itself glowing with atmospheric warmth.
Cobalt tones deepen and lighten across the geometry, shifting into neighboring hues.
A measured arrangement of translucent planes fills the space, balancing density with legibility.
Ordered elements emanate radially, a starburst of crystal planes diverging from the center. Three luminous cores divide the form.
Mixed surfaces with moderate fragmentation, some panels smooth, others faceted, anchored by 173 luminous points.
cards.reading: Blue-white clarity breaking through layers of itself, as if ice could sing.
